arts.ttl: Man Utd sign teenager Heaven from Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United sign England Under-19s defender Ayden Heaven from Arsenal on a four-and-a-half-year contract.

arts.ttl: Arsenal get fresh Ollie Watkins transfer incentive as ‘personal terms agreed’ in shock talks
arts.sum: Arsenal could reignite their pursuit of Ollie Watkins following a shocking transfer decision by Aston Villa. Fresh off making it clear he wants Watkins to stay, Villa have continued to be very active in January with Chelsea's Joao Felix linked, but it was a different Premier League forward that became the focus for Emery.

arts.ttl: Mo Salah double piles pressure on Arsenal as Liverpool go nine points clear - 5 talking points
arts.sum: BOURNEMOUTH 0-2 LIVERPOOL: Both teams came into this game in superb form but the Reds overcame the threat of the Cherries as Mohamed Salah put on a show with a brace to make Premier League history

arts.ttl: ‘Maybe’: Arsenal could look to sign ‘excellent’ player from Borussia Dortmund – journalist
arts.sum: Arsenal do have work to do in the transfer window, but with just days to go until the window closes, the Gunners may not get...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola gets honest message from Mikel Arteta over his Man City team ‘going backwards’
arts.sum: As Pep Guardiola's Manchester City prepare to head down and face Arsenal at the Emirates, Mikel Arteta has sent a message to the man he used to work under

arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal vs. Manchester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Arsenal and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher promises to 'have a word' with Micah Richards over Arsenal disagreement
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has taken issue with Micah Richards' response to the controversy surrounding Michael Oliver and the red card he showed to Arsenal star Myles Lewis-Skelly

arts.ttl: Technical director planning talks with Arsenal’s Mikel Arteta – Wants to convince him to sanction transfer
arts.sum: Flamengo are continuing to insist on signing Jorginho from Arsenal this month and now intend to try and convince Mikel Arteta to let him go. That’s according to journalist Venê Casagrande, who reports that Flamengo technical director José Boto ‘will take to Arteta’ about the transfer. Jorginho has been linked with a move to Brazil The post Technical director planning talks with Arsenal’s Mikel Arteta – Wants to convince him to sanction transfer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Guardiola sends €24m to Barcelona as Man City with fourth major signing
arts.sum: With this in mind, Guardiola has set his eyes on former Barcelona star Nico Gonzalez, who is currently playing with Porto . Although Man City have already completed a string of big deals during the transfer window, headlined by Omar Marmoush’s switch from Eintracht Frankfurt for around €80 million, the out-of-sorts Etihad outfit are still seeking to achieve more.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta tells Pep Guardiola how he's made a rod for his own back in 12-word message
arts.sum: Despite climbing back up to fourth in the Premier League, Pep Guardiola’s Manchester City are still struggling this season, and Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has explained the issue he faces
